javascript:(function(b%2Cw)%7Btypeof%20exports%3D%3D%22object%22%26%26typeof%20module%3C%22u%22%3Fw(exports)%3Atypeof%20define%3D%3D%22function%22%26%26define.amd%3Fdefine(%5B%22exports%22%5D%2Cw)%3A(b%3Dtypeof%20globalThis%3C%22u%22%3FglobalThis%3Ab%7C%7Cself%2Cw(b.Sidetation%3D%7B%7D))%7D)(this%2Cfunction(b)%7B%22use%20strict%22%3Bconst%20w%3D%60%0A%3Ahost%20%7B%0A%20%20all%3A%20initial%3B%0A%7D%0A*%20%7B%0A%20%20box-sizing%3A%20border-box%3B%0A%20%20font-family%3A%20-apple-system%2C%20BlinkMacSystemFont%2C%20%22Segoe%20UI%22%2C%20%22PingFang%20SC%22%2C%20%22Hiragino%20Sans%20GB%22%2C%20sans-serif%3B%0A%7D%0A%0A%2F*%20----%20hover%20highlight%20----%20*%2F%0A.hover-box%20%7B%0A%20%20position%3A%20fixed%3B%0A%20%20display%3A%20none%3B%0A%20%20pointer-events%3A%20none%3B%0A%20%20border%3A%201px%20dashed%20rgba(79%2C%20140%2C%20255%2C%200.9)%3B%0A%20%20background%3A%20rgba(79%2C%20140%2C%20255%2C%200.08)%3B%0A%20%20z-index%3A%201%3B%0A%7D%0A%0A%2F*%20----%20selection%20box%20%2B%20handles%20----%20*%2F%0A.sel-box%20%7B%0A%20%20position%3A%20fixed%3B%0A%20%20display%3A%20none%3B%0A%20%20pointer-events%3A%20none%3B%0A%20%20border%3A%201.5px%20solid%20%234f8cff%3B%0A%20%20z-index%3A%202%3B%0A%7D%0A.sel-label%20%7B%0A%20%20position%3A%20absolute%3B%0A%20%20top%3A%20-24px%3B%0A%20%20left%3A%20-1.5px%3B%0A%20%20padding%3A%202px%208px%3B%0A%20%20background%3A%20%234f8cff%3B%0A%20%20color%3A%20%23fff%3B%0A%20%20font-size%3A%2011px%3B%0A%20%20line-height%3A%2016px%3B%0A%20%20border-radius%3A%204px%3B%0A%20%20white-space%3A%20nowrap%3B%0A%20%20pointer-events%3A%20none%3B%0A%7D%0A.handle%20%7B%0A%20%20position%3A%20absolute%3B%0A%20%20width%3A%2010px%3B%0A%20%20height%3A%2010px%3B%0A%20%20background%3A%20%23fff%3B%0A%20%20border%3A%201.5px%20solid%20%234f8cff%3B%0A%20%20border-radius%3A%202px%3B%0A%20%20pointer-events%3A%20auto%3B%0A%7D%0A.handle%5Bdata-dir%3D%22nw%22%5D%20%7B%20top%3A%20-6px%3B%20%20left%3A%20-6px%3B%20%20cursor%3A%20nwse-resize%3B%20%7D%0A.handle%5Bdata-dir%3 %22)%2Cthis.shortcutsEl%3Ds(%22shortcuts%22)%2Cthis.toolbarEl%3Ds(%22toolbar%22)%2Cthis.toastEl%3Ds(%22toast%22)%2Cdocument.documentElement.appendChild(this.host)%7Dplace(t%2Ce)%7Bif(!e)%7Bt.style.display%3D%22none%22%3Breturn%7Dt.style.display%3D%22block%22%2Ct.style.left%3D%60%24%7Be.left%7Dpx%60%2Ct.style.top%3D%60%24%7Be.top%7Dpx%60%2Ct.style.width%3D%60%24%7Be.width%7Dpx%60%2Ct.style.height%3D%60%24%7Be.height%7Dpx%60%7DsetHover(t)%7Bthis.place(this.hoverBox%2Ct)%7DsetSelection(t%2Ce%3D%22%22)%7Bthis.place(this.selBox%2Ct)%2Ct%26%26(this.selLabel.textContent%3De)%7DsetGuides(t%2Ce)%7Bthis.guideV.style.display%3Dt%3D%3D%3Dnull%3F%22none%22%3A%22block%22%2Ct!%3D%3Dnull%26%26(this.guideV.style.left%3D%60%24%7Bt%7Dpx%60)%2Cthis.guideH.style.display%3De%3D%3D%3Dnull%3F%22none%22%3A%22block%22%2Ce!%3D%3Dnull%26%26(this.guideH.style.top%3D%60%24%7Be%7Dpx%60)%7Dtoast(t)%7Bthis.toastEl.textContent%3Dt%2Cthis.toastEl.classList.add(%22show%22)%2CclearTimeout(this.toastTimer)%2Cthis.toastTimer%3Dwindow.setTimeout(()%3D%3Ethis.toastEl.classList.remove(%22show%22)%2C1600)%7Ddestroy()%7BclearTimeout(this.toastTimer)%2Cthis.host.remove()%7D%7Dconst%20K%3D%2F(%5E%7C%5B-_%5D)%5B0-9a-f%5D%7B5%2C%7D(%5B-_%5D%7C%24)%7C%5E(css%7Csc%7Cjss%7Cemotion)-%7C__%5BA-Za-z0-9%5D%7B5%2C%7D%24%2Fi%2C_%3D%5B%22data-testid%22%2C%22data-test%22%2C%22data-cy%22%5D%3Bfunction%20I(o)%7Breturn%20Array.from(o.classList).filter(t%3D%3Et.length%3C%3D24%26%26!K.test(t)%26%26!%2F%5Cd%7B3%2C%7D%2F.test(t)).slice(0%2C2)%7Dfunction%20R(o)%7Breturn!o.id%7C%7C%2F%5Cd%7B3%2C%7D%2F.test(o.id)%7C%7C%2F%5E%5B0-9a-f-%5D%7B8%2C%7D%24%2Fi.test(o.id)%3Fnull%3Ao.id%7Dfunction%20M(o)%7Bconst%20t%3Do.tagName.toLowerCase()%3Bfor(const%20s%20of%20_)%7Bconst%20n%3Do.getAttribute(s)%3Bif(n)return%60%24%7Bt%7D%5B%24%7Bs%7D%3D%22%24%7Bn%7D%22%5D%60%7Dconst%20e%3DI(o).map(s%3D%3E%60.%24%7BCSS.escape(s)%7D%60).join(%22%22)%3Breturn%20t%2Be%7Dfunction%20%24(o%2Ct)%7Btry%7Bconst%20e%3Ddocument.querySelectorAll(o)%3Breturn%20e.lengt %3Dnew%20XMLSerializer().serializeToString(e)%2Cn%3DMath.ceil(t.width)%2Ci%3DMath.ceil(t.height)%2Ca%3D%60%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D%22http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg%22%20width%3D%22%24%7Bn%7D%22%20height%3D%22%24%7Bi%7D%22%3E%3CforeignObject%20width%3D%22100%25%22%20height%3D%22100%25%22%3E%24%7Bs%7D%3C%2FforeignObject%3E%3C%2Fsvg%3E%60%3Breturn%60data%3Aimage%2Fsvg%2Bxml%3Bcharset%3Dutf-8%2C%24%7BencodeURIComponent(a)%7D%60%7Dcatch%7Breturn%20null%7D%7Dconst%20tt%3D800%3Bfunction%20N(o)%7Breturn!o.moved%26%26!o.resized%26%26!o.deleted%26%26Object.keys(o.props).length%3D%3D%3D0%26%26o.text%3D%3D%3Dnull%7Dfunction%20et(o%2Ct)%7Bconst%20e%3DObject.keys(o)%3Breturn%20e.length%3D%3D%3DObject.keys(t).length%26%26e.every(s%3D%3Eo%5Bs%5D%3D%3D%3Dt%5Bs%5D)%7Dfunction%20st(o%2Ct)%7Breturn%20o.dx%3D%3D%3Dt.dx%26%26o.dy%3D%3D%3Dt.dy%26%26o.size.w%3D%3D%3Dt.size.w%26%26o.size.h%3D%3D%3Dt.size.h%26%26o.moved%3D%3D%3Dt.moved%26%26o.resized%3D%3D%3Dt.resized%26%26o.deleted%3D%3D%3Dt.deleted%26%26o.text%3D%3D%3Dt.text%26%26et(o.props%2Ct.props)%7Dconst%20nt%3D%7Bdx%3A0%2Cdy%3A0%2Cmoved%3A!1%2Cresized%3A!1%2Cdeleted%3A!1%2Ctext%3Anull%7D%3Bclass%20ot%7Bconstructor()%7Bthis.records%3Dnew%20Map%2Cthis.undoStack%3D%5B%5D%2Cthis.redoStack%3D%5B%5D%2Cthis.seq%3D1%2Cthis.onChange%3Dnull%7Densure(t)%7Blet%20e%3Dthis.records.get(t)%3Bif(e)return%20e%3Bconst%20s%3Dt.getBoundingClientRect()%2Cn%3DgetComputedStyle(t)%2Ci%3Dn.boxSizing%3D%3D%3D%22content-box%22%2Ca%3Dr%3D%3EparseFloat(r)%7C%7C0%3Breturn%20e%3D%7Bid%3Athis.seq%2B%2B%2Cel%3At%2Cselector%3Aq(t)%2Ctag%3At.tagName.toLowerCase()%2CoriginalRect%3A%7Bx%3As.left%2Bwindow.scrollX%2Cy%3As.top%2Bwindow.scrollY%2Cw%3As.width%2Ch%3As.height%7D%2CsavedInline%3A%7Btransform%3At.style.getPropertyValue(%22transform%22)%2Cwidth%3At.style.getPropertyValue(%22width%22)%2Cheight%3At.style.getPropertyValue(%22height%22)%2Cdisplay%3At.style.getPropertyValue(%22display%22)%7D%2CbaseTransform%3An.transform%2CbaseDisplay%3An.display%2CsizeAdj%3Ai%3F%7Bw%3A this.undoStack.push(t)%2Cthis.emit()%2C!0%7Drevert(t)%7Bconst%20e%3Dthis.all().find(n%3D%3En.id%3D%3D%3Dt)%3Bif(!e)return%3Bconst%20s%3Dthis.snapshot(e)%3Bthis.applySnap(e%2C%7B...nt%2Csize%3A%7B...e.startSize%7D%2Cprops%3A%7B%7D%7D)%2Cthis.undoStack.push(%7Bentries%3A%5B%7Brec%3Ae%2Cbefore%3As%2Cafter%3Athis.snapshot(e)%7D%5D%2Ccoalesce%3Anull%2Cat%3ADate.now()%7D)%2Cthis.redoStack.length%3D0%2Cthis.emit()%7DresetAll()%7Bfor(const%20t%20of%20this.all())this.revert(t.id)%7DapplySnap(t%2Ce)%7Bt.dx%3De.dx%2Ct.dy%3De.dy%2Ct.size%3D%7B...e.size%7D%2Ct.moved%3De.moved%2Ct.resized%3De.resized%2Ct.deleted%3De.deleted%2Ct.props%3D%7B...e.props%7D%2Ct.text%3De.text%2CC(t)%2Cthis.cleanup(t)%7Dcleanup(t)%7BN(t)%3Fthis.records.delete(t.el)%3Athis.records.set(t.el%2Ct)%7Dprune()%7Bfor(const%5Bt%2Ce%5Dof%20this.records)N(e)%26%26this.records.delete(t)%7Demit()%7Bvar%20t%3B(t%3Dthis.onChange)%3D%3Dnull%7C%7Ct.call(this)%7D%7Dconst%20y%3DMath.round%2Cit%3D%5B%5B%22%E7%82%B9%E5%87%BB%22%2C%22%E9%80%89%E4%B8%AD%E5%85%83%E7%B4%A0%EF%BC%8C%E7%82%B9%E5%AD%90%E5%85%83%E7%B4%A0%E5%8F%AF%E4%B8%8B%E9%92%BB%22%5D%2C%5B%22%E5%8F%8C%E5%87%BB%22%2C%22%E7%BC%96%E8%BE%91%E6%96%87%E5%AD%97%E5%86%85%E5%AE%B9%EF%BC%88%E7%BA%AF%E6%96%87%E6%9C%AC%E5%85%83%E7%B4%A0%EF%BC%89%22%5D%2C%5B%22%E2%8C%A5%20%E7%82%B9%E5%87%BB%22%2C%22%E9%80%89%E4%B8%AD%E7%88%B6%E7%BA%A7%E5%85%83%E7%B4%A0%22%5D%2C%5B%22%E6%8B%96%E6%8B%BD%22%2C%22%E7%A7%BB%E5%8A%A8%E5%85%83%E7%B4%A0%EF%BC%8C%E8%87%AA%E5%8A%A8%E5%AF%B9%E9%BD%90%E5%90%B8%E9%99%84%22%5D%2C%5B%22%E6%8B%96%E6%8B%BD%E6%89%8B%E6%9F%84%20%2F%20%E2%87%A7%22%2C%22%E7%BC%A9%E6%94%BE%20%2F%20%E7%AD%89%E6%AF%94%E7%BC%A9%E6%94%BE%22%5D%2C%5B%22%E6%96%B9%E5%90%91%E9%94%AE%20%2F%20%E2%87%A7%E6%96%B9%E5%90%91%E9%94%AE%22%2C%22%E5%BE%AE%E8%B0%83%201px%20%2F%2010px%22%5D%2C%5B%22Delete%20%2F%20%E2%8C%AB%22%2C%22%E5%88%A0%E9%99%A4%E5%85%83%E7%B4%A0%22%5D%2C%5B%22%E2%8C%98Z%20%2F%20%E2%8C%98%E2%87%A7Z%22%2C%22%E6%92%A4%E9%94%80%20%2F%20%E9%87%8D%E5%81%9A%22%5D%2C%5B%22Enter%20%2F%20%E2%87%A7Enter%22%2C%22%E8%BF%9B%E5%85%A5%E5%AD%90%E7%BA%A7%20%2F%20%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E7%88%B6%E7%BA%A7%22%5D%2C%5B%22Tab%20%2F%20%E2%87%A7Tab%22%2C%22%E4%B8%8B%E4%B8%80%E4%B8%AA%20%2F%20%E4%B8%8A%E4%B8%80%E4%B8%AA%E5%85%84%E5%BC%9F%E5%85%83%E7%B4%A0%22%5D%2C%5B%22Esc%22%2C%22%E5%8F%96%E6%B6%88%E9%80%89%E4%B8%AD%EF%BC%8C%E5%86%8D%E6%8C%89%E9%80%80%E5%87%BA%E7%BC%96%E8%BE%91%22%5D%5D%3Bclass%20rt%7Bconstructor(t%2Ce%2Cs%2Cn)%7Bthis.panel%3De%2Cthis.shortcuts%3Ds%2Cthis.cb%3Dn%2Cthis.panelOpen%3D!1%2Cthis.records%3D%5B%5D%3Bconst%20i%3Ddocument.createElement(%22div%22)%3Bi.className%3D%22brand%22%3Bconst%20a%3Ddocument.createElement(%22span%22)%3Ba.className%3D%22brand-dot%22%2Ci.append(a%2C%22Sidetation%22)%2Ct.append(i)%3Bconst%20r%3D(c%2Cm)%3D%3E%7Bconst%20f%3Ddocument.createElement(%22button%22)%3Breturn%20f.textContent%3Dc%2Cf.addEventListener(%22click%22%2Cm)%2Ct.append(f)%2Cf%7D%2Cl%3D()%3D%3E%7Bconst%20c%3Ddocument.createElement(%22div%22)%3Bc.className%3D%22divider%22%2Ct.append(c)%7D%3Bthis.toggleBtn%3Dr(%22%E5%BC%80%E5%A7%8B%E7%BC%96%E8%BE%91%22%2C()%3D%3En.onToggle())%2Cthis.toggleBtn.classList.add(%22primary%22)%2Cthis.kbdBtn%3Dr(%22%22%2C()%3D%3E%7B%7D)%2Cthis.kbdBtn.classList.add(%22kbd-btn%22)%2Cthis.kbdBtn.title%3D%22%E5%BF%AB%E6%8D%B7%E9%94%AE%22%3Bconst%20d%3D%22http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg%22%2Cp%3Ddocument.createElementNS(d%2C%22svg%22)%3Bp.setAttribute(%22viewBox%22%2C%220%200%2024%2024%22)%2Cp.setAttribute(%22fill%22%2C%22none%22)%2Cp.setAttribute(%22stroke%22%2C%22currentColor%22)%2Cp.setAttribute(%22stroke-width%22%2C%222%22)%2Cp.setAttribute(%22stroke-linecap%22%2C%22round%22)%2Cp.setAttribute(%22stroke-linejoin%22%2C%22round%22)%3Bconst%20g%3Ddocument.createElementNS(d%2C%22path%22)%3Bg.setAttribute(%22d%22%2C%22M15%206v12a3%203%200%201%200%203-3H6a3%203%200%201%200%203%203V6a3%203%200%201%200-3%203h12a3%203%200%201%200-3-3%22)%2Cp.append(g)%2Cthis.kbdBtn.append(p)%2Cthis.buildShortcuts()%2Cthis.kbdBtn.addEventListener(%22mouseenter%22%2C()%3D%3Ethis.showShortcuts())%2Cthis.kbdBtn.addEventListener(%22mouseleave%22%2C()%3D%3Ethis.shortcuts.classList.remove(%22open%22))%2Cl()%2Cthis.editsBtn%3Dr(%22%E4%BF%AE%E6%94%B9%200%22%2C()%3D%3Ethis.togglePanel())%2Cthis.resetBtn%3Dr(%22%E9%87%8D%E7%BD%AE%22%2C()%3D%3En.onReset())%2Cl()%2Cthis.mdBtn%3Dr(%22%E5%A4%8D%E5%88%B6%20Markdown%22%2C()%3D%3En.onCopyMd())%2Cthis.cssBtn%3Dr(%22%E5%A4%8D%E5%88%B6%20CSS%22%2C()%3D%3En.onCopyCss())%7DbuildShortcuts()%7Bconst%20t%3Ddocument.createElement(%22div%22)%3Bt.className%3D%22shortcuts-title%22%2Ct.textContent%3D%22%E5%BF%AB%E6%8D%B7%E9%94%AE%22%2Cthis.shortcuts.append(t)%3Bfor(const%5Be%2Cs%5Dof%20it)%7Bconst%20n%3Ddocument.createElement(%22div%22)%3Bn.className%3D%22shortcut-row%22%3Bconst%20i%3Ddocument.createElement(%22span%22)%3Bi.className%3D%22kbd%22%2Ci.textContent%3De%3Bconst%20a%3Ddocument.createElement(%22span%22)%3Ba.className%3D%22shortcut-desc%22%2Ca.textContent%3Ds%2Cn.append(i%2Ca)%2Cthis.shortcuts.append(n)%7D%7DbuildThumbs(t)%7Bconst%20e%3Ddocument.createElement(%22div%22)%3Be.className%3D%22edit-thumbs%22%3Bconst%20s%3D(a%2Cr%3D!1)%3D%3E%7Bconst%20l%3Ddocument.createElement(%22div%22)%3Bif(l.className%3D%22thumb%22%2Cr)l.classList.add(%22deleted%22)%2Cl.textContent%3D%22%E2%9C%95%22%3Belse%20if(a)%7Bconst%20d%3Ddocument.createElement(%22img%22)%3Bd.src%3Da%2Cd.alt%3D%22%22%2Cl.append(d)%7Delse%20l.textContent%3D%22%3F%22%2Cl.classList.add(%22empty%22)%3Breturn%20l%7D%2Cn%3Ddocument.createElement(%22span%22)%3Bn.className%3D%22thumb-arrow%22%2Cn.textContent%3D%22%E2%86%92%22%3Bconst%20i%3Dt.deleted%7C%7C!t.el.isConnected%3Fs(null%2C!0)%3As(j(t.el))%3Breturn%20e.append(s(t.beforeSnap)%2Cn%2Ci)%2Ce%7DshowShortcuts()%7Bconst%20t%3Dthis.kbdBtn.getBoundingClientRect()%3Bthis.shortcuts.style.left%3D%60%24%7Bt.left%2Bt.width%2F2%7Dpx%60%2Cthis.shortcuts.style.bottom%3D%60%24%7Bwindow.innerHeight-t.top%2B10%7Dpx%60%2Cthis.shortcuts.classList.add(%22open%22)%7DtogglePanel()%7Bthis.panelOpen%3D!this.panel %3D0%2Cthis.savedUserSelect%3D%22%22%2Cthis.loop%3D()%3D%3E%7Bif(this.selected%26%26this.selected.isConnected)%7Bconst%20e%3Dthis.selected.getBoundingClientRect()%3Bthis.overlay.setSelection(e%2Cthis.selectionLabel())%2Cthis.propsPanel.refreshRect(e)%7Delse%20this.selected%26%26(this.selected%3Dnull)%2Cthis.overlay.setSelection(null)%3Bthis.hovered%26%26this.hovered.isConnected%26%26this.hovered!%3D%3Dthis.selected%3Fthis.overlay.setHover(this.hovered.getBoundingClientRect())%3Athis.overlay.setHover(null)%2Cthis.rafId%3DrequestAnimationFrame(this.loop)%7D%2Cthis.onPointerMove%3De%3D%3E%7Bif(this.resize)%7Bthis.moveResize(e)%3Breturn%7Dif(this.drag)%7Bthis.moveDrag(e)%3Breturn%7Dif(this.inOverlay(e))%7Bthis.hovered%3Dnull%3Breturn%7Dthis.hovered%3Dthis.pageElementAt(e.clientX%2Ce.clientY)%7D%2Cthis.onPointerDown%3De%3D%3E%7Bif(this.inOverlay(e))return%3Bif(this.textEdit)%7Bif(e.composedPath().includes(this.textEdit.el))return%3Bthis.commitTextEdit()%7Dif(e.preventDefault()%2Ce.stopPropagation()%2Ce.altKey%26%26this.selected)%7Bthis.isSelectable(this.selected.parentElement)%26%26this.select(this.selected.parentElement)%3Breturn%7Dconst%20s%3Dthis.pageElementAt(e.clientX%2Ce.clientY)%3Bif(!s)%7Bthis.select(null)%3Breturn%7Dconst%20n%3DDate.now()%3Bif(s%3D%3D%3Dthis.lastDownTarget%26%26n-this.lastDownAt%3C400)%7Bthis.lastDownAt%3D0%2Cthis.startTextEdit(s)%3Breturn%7Dthis.lastDownAt%3Dn%2Cthis.lastDownTarget%3Ds%2Cthis.selected!%3D%3Dnull%26%26(s%3D%3D%3Dthis.selected%7C%7Cthis.selected.contains(s))%7C%7Cthis.select(s)%3Bconst%20a%3Dthis.selected%3Bthis.drag%3D%7Bel%3Aa%2CstartX%3Ae.clientX%2CstartY%3Ae.clientY%2Crec%3Anull%2Cbefore%3Anull%2CbaseDx%3A0%2CbaseDy%3A0%2Cmoved%3A!1%2CdownTarget%3As%7D%7D%2Cthis.onPointerUp%3De%3D%3E%7Bif(this.resize)%7Bconst%20s%3Dthis.resize%3Bthis.resize%3Dnull%2Cdocument.documentElement.style.cursor%3D%22%22%2Cthis.history.commit(s.rec%2Cs.before)%3Breturn%7Dif(this.drag)%7Bconst%20s%3Dthis.drag%3Bthis.drag%3Dnull%2Cthis.overlay.setGuides Text(t).then(()%3D%3Ethis.overlay.toast(e)%2C()%3D%3Es())%3As()%7DgetMarkdown()%7Breturn%20X(this.history.all())%7DgetCSS()%7Breturn%20W(this.history.all())%7Dundo()%7Breturn%20this.history.undo()%7Dredo()%7Breturn%20this.history.redo()%7DsyncUI()%7Bthis.history.prune()%2Cthis.toolbar.update(this.active%2Cthis.history.all())%2Cthis.propsPanel.sync()%7D%7Dfunction%20ct(o)%7Breturn%20new%20Y(o)%7Db.Sidetation%3DY%2Cb.init%3Dct%2CObject.defineProperty(b%2CSymbol.toStringTag%2C%7Bvalue%3A%22Module%22%7D)%7D)%3B%0A%3B(function()%7Bvar%20s%3Dwindow.Sidetation%7C%7CglobalThis.Sidetation%3Bif(document.querySelector('%5Bdata-sidetation%5D'))%7Bconsole.log('Sidetation%20already%20injected')%3Breturn%3B%7Dwindow.__sidetation%3Ds.init(%7BautoStart%3Atrue%7D)%3Bconsole.log('Sidetation%20ready%20%E2%80%94%20%E5%B7%B2%E8%87%AA%E5%8A%A8%E8%BF%9B%E5%85%A5%E7%BC%96%E8%BE%91%E6%A8%A1%E5%BC%8F')%3B%7D)()%3B
